title: Molecular Profiling of Tisotumab Vedotin-Treated Patients Identifies Immune Pathways Associated With Clinical Activity.
abstract: Tisotumab vedotin (TV) is a tissue factor (TF)-specific antibody-drug conjugate that was evaluated in the innovaTV 204 study in patients with recurrent or metastatic cervical cancer (r/mCC). Although TF expression is required for TV binding to tumor cells, clinical responses were found to be independent of TF levels. This study aimed to evaluate whether baseline tumor gene expression signatures consistent with the proposed mechanisms of action of TV were associated with clinical outcomes.
trial_name: Phase 2 study of retifanlimab in patients with advanced or metastatic MCC
